output_generation_method: Codex invoked scripts/audit_package.py for each synthetic package and archived audit-report.md as case_XXX.md.
important_limitations: This is not an independently blinded external LLM run.
Reports were generated through the default deterministic audit orchestrator invoked by Codex.
Reports contain absolute local paths from the run environment.
Synthetic packages are calibration fixtures and do not establish real-world manuscript performance.
